idea-plugin.name: Blazor Quick Switch
idea-plugin.description:
Blazor Quick Switch

Quickly switch between related Blazor component files using a single keyboard shortcut. Inspired by the popular Angular CLI QuickSwitch plugin.

Supported file types

  • .razor — Razor component markup
  • .razor.cs — Code-behind
  • .razor.css — Scoped CSS
  • .razor.js — JavaScript interop

Usage

Open any Blazor component file and press Alt+S to cycle to the next related file. The plugin automatically detects sibling files that share the same component name and switches between them in order. Only files that exist on disk are included in the cycle.

Features

  • One shortcut to cycle through all related Blazor component files
  • Skips file types that don't exist for the current component
  • Replaces the current editor tab (no tab clutter)
  • Customizable keyboard shortcut via Settings > Keymap > "Blazor Quick Switch"
  • Rider only

action.description: Quickly switch between related Blazor component files (.razor, .razor.cs, .razor.css, .razor.js)
